title: GWI POS Support Bundle Manifest
description: Manifest included at the top level of every support bundle tarball. Documents what is included, what was redacted, and which logs were truncated. Written by generate-support-bundle.sh. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","created_at":"2026-03-20T16:00:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","host_boot_id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890","redaction_applied":true,"included_files":["state/run-state.json","state/hardening-status.json","logs/thepasspos.journal","system/ufw-status.txt","env-redacted.txt"],"truncated_logs":["thepasspos.journal"],"tool_version":"1.0.0"}

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this bundle was created.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

host_boot_id.description: Boot session ID from /proc/sys/kernel/random/boot_id. Changes on every reboot.

redaction_applied.description: Always true. Indicates that .env values matching SECRET|TOKEN|PASSWORD|PRIVATE|KEY|API_KEY patterns have been replaced with [REDACTED]. Bearer tokens and JWTs in logs are also redacted.

included_files.description: Relative paths of all files included in the bundle. Paths are relative to the bundle root directory.

truncated_logs.description: Names of log files that were truncated to the 10,000-line limit. Empty array if no logs were truncated.

tool_version.description: Version of generate-support-bundle.sh that created this bundle.
